title: Windows Update pending reboot
description: Checks the Component Based Servicing RebootPending registry key at agent startup and emits windows_update_reboot_pending ONLY when a reboot is actually pending (the key exists). A pending reboot present when the agent starts is a high-confidence corroborator that a Windows Update (often a quality/cumulative update installed during the OOBE 'Getting updates' phase, before the agent started) landed and now needs a restart — which can delay or block enrollment completion.
author: Autopilot Monitor
